items.title: Component API design: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? TypeScript prop types automatically guarantee the component is accessible and semantically valid.

feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Types check shapes; document and test semantic contracts, accessibility, state, and callback behavior separately.
